item.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5 with Enhanced Reasoning
item.description: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5, featuring significant improvements in mathematical reasoning and code generation. The model scores 92% on graduate-level math benchmarks.

item.title: Apple Reveals M5 Chip Architecture
item.description: Apple's new M5 processor uses a 2nm process and delivers 40% better performance per watt compared to M4. Expected in MacBook Pro models later this year.

item.title: EU Passes Comprehensive AI Regulation Framework
item.description: The European Union has approved sweeping AI regulations requiring transparency, bias audits, and human oversight for high-risk AI systems deployed in member states.

item.title: SpaceX Successfully Tests Starship Orbital Refueling
item.description: SpaceX completed the first successful orbital propellant transfer between two Starship vehicles, a critical milestone for lunar and Mars missions.

item.title: Quantum Computing Breakthrough: 1000-Qubit Processor
item.description: IBM has demonstrated a 1000-qubit quantum processor with error correction, marking a significant step toward practical quantum advantage in drug discovery and materials science.

item.title: Global Cybersecurity Spending to Reach $300B in 2026
item.description: A new Gartner report projects worldwide cybersecurity spending will hit $300 billion in 2026, driven by AI-powered threats and expanding attack surfaces from IoT devices.
